steps.title: Find both behaviors
steps.content: The student wants a difference between jellyfish behavior and black dragonfish behavior. A correct sentence must mention both organisms and contrast why each emits light. General information about bioluminescence or a description of only one animal cannot show the requested difference.

steps.title: Choose the direct contrast
steps.content: Choice A states a similarity: both organisms emit light produced by chemical reactions. Choice B describes only black dragonfish, saying their steady red light helps them locate prey in deep waters. Choice C defines bioluminescence without mentioning either animal. The needed contrast is between jellyfish using light to startle predators and black dragonfish using light to locate prey. The answer is D.
